favorites.title: My Network
favorites.noFavoritesAdmin: Click "Add Device" to add devices from any network to favorites.
favorites.noFavoritesVisitor: Please log in as admin to add devices from any network to favorites.

addFavoriteModal.title: Add Device to Favorites
addFavoriteModal.allDevicesInFavorites: All devices are already in favorites

editFavoriteModal.title: Edit Favorite
editFavoriteModal.customNameHint: Leave empty to use default name

favorites.monitoringEmptyDetail: No rows in the auto-scan queue.

hostsList.title: Network Dashboard
hostsList.subtitle: Overview of networks and devices
hostsList.noNetworks: No networks. Go to Manage Networks to add a new network.
hostsList.noNetworksVisitor: No networks. Please log in as admin to add a network or networks.

networksList.title: Manage Networks
networksList.noNetworks: No networks. Add a new network to get started.

availableIPs.title: Get Available IP
availableIPs.noNetworksDescription: Add a network from Manage Networks to see available addresses.
availableIPs.rangeOnly: This network has {{count}} addresses (from {{start}} to {{end}}). Use the View Networks page to see the full list.
availableIPs.noAvailableInRange: No usable addresses in this network range.
availableIPs.noAvailableIPsDescription: All addresses in this network range are in use.

networkView.title: View Network
networkView.scanResult: Discovered {{total}} devices and added {{added}} new devices
networkView.scanMethodIntro: Choose how to detect active devices. Enable one or both; saved preferences apply to manual scans and auto scan.
networkView.scanMethodPingHelp: Sends ICMP ping to check reachability. Usually faster; some devices or firewalls may block replies.
networkView.scanMethodTcpHelp: Tries TCP connections to common ports (e.g. web, SSH). Finds hosts that block ping but run services; can be slower and noisier on the network.
networkView.offlineReleaseLabel: Release IP after device stays offline
networkView.offlineReleaseHelp: If a host stays offline on this network for the duration below, its record is deleted automatically so the IP shows as available (same effect as deleting the host manually). If it was in favorites, that favorite is removed too.
networkView.scanNeedOneMethod: Enable Ping or port scan (or both).
networkView.scanPreferencesSaved: Scan preferences saved for this network (including auto scan).
networkView.detectionSummaryLine: Detection breakdown: ping only {{ping}}, port only {{port}}, both {{both}}
networkView.bulkDeleteConfirm: Delete {{count}} device(s)? This cannot be undone.
networkView.bulkEditTagsHint: Selected tags replace tags on every selected device.
networkView.scanToAdd: Scan the network to add discovered devices
networkView.noTagsAvailable: No tags available. Go to Tags Management to add new tags.
networkView.rangeTooLarge: Range too large to display ({{count}} addresses). Please use subnet /22 or larger for visual display.

tagsManagement.title: Tags Management
tagsManagement.noTags: No tags. Add a new tag to get started.

login.title: Login
login.setupRequired: This is the first run of the application. Please set up a visitor password and an admin password.

setup.title: Application Setup
setup.subtitle: This is the first run of the application. Please create a visitor password and an admin password.
setup.visitorPasswordMinLength: Visitor password must be at least 3 characters
setup.adminPasswordMinLength: Admin password must be at least 3 characters
setup.setupError: An error occurred while creating passwords

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 3 characters
changePassword.error: An error occurred while changing password

changeVisitorPassword.title: Change Visitor Password
changeVisitorPassword.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 3 characters
changeVisitorPassword.error: An error occurred while changing visitor password

confirm.deleteFavorite: Are you sure you want to delete this device from favorites?
confirm.deleteGroup: Are you sure you want to delete this group? All devices will be removed from the group.
confirm.deleteTag: Are you sure you want to delete this tag?
confirm.deleteNetwork: Are you sure you want to delete this network and all associated devices?
confirm.deleteHost: Are you sure you want to delete this host?
confirm.clearAllHosts: Are you sure you want to delete all hosts in this network?
confirm.clearAllData:
Warning: All devices, networks, and tags will be deleted.

Are you absolutely sure you want to delete all data?

success.networkDeleted: Network and its devices were deleted successfully

api.networkError: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
api.invalidResponse: The server returned an unexpected response.
api.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
api.forbidden: You don't have permission for this action.
api.notFound: The requested item was not found.
api.serverError: Something went wrong on the server. Try again later.
api.requestFailed: The request could not be completed.

error.refreshPage: We apologize for the inconvenience. Please refresh the page and try again.

auth.adminAccessDescription: Enter admin password to access editing and management permissions.
auth.adminLoginError: An error occurred while logging in as admin

apiErrors.VISITOR_PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH: Visitor password must be at least 3 characters.
apiErrors.ADMIN_PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH: Admin password must be at least 3 characters.
apiErrors.CURRENT_AND_NEW_PASSWORD_REQUIRED: Current password and new password are required.
apiErrors.NEW_PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH: New password must be at least 3 characters.
apiErrors.ACTION_ADD_OR_REMOVE: action must be add or remove.
apiErrors.ENABLE_PING_OR_TCP: Enable Ping scan, TCP port scan, or both.
apiErrors.NETWORK_FIELDS_REQUIRED: Network name, network ID, and subnet are required.
apiErrors.OFFLINE_RELEASE_NOT_ALLOWED: This offline-release value is not allowed.
apiErrors.AUTO_SCAN_INTERVAL_INVALID: Auto-scan interval must be one of: 5, 10, 15, 20, 30, 45, or 60 minutes.
apiErrors.HOST_ALREADY_IN_FAVORITES: This host is already in favorites.
apiErrors.CIDR_RANGE_22_TO_30: CIDR range must be between /22 and /30.
apiErrors.INVALID_URL: Invalid URL. Use http:// or https://
apiErrors.NETWORK_ID_INVALID_IP: Network ID must be a valid IPv4 address.
apiErrors.INVALID_COLOR_HEX: Invalid color format. Use hex like #4a9eff.
apiErrors.RATE_LIMIT_LOGIN: Too many login attempts. Try again later.
apiErrors.RATE_LIMIT_ADMIN_LOGIN: Too many admin login attempts. Try again later.
apiErrors.RATE_LIMIT_SETUP: Too many setup attempts. Try again later.
apiErrors.ROUTE_NOT_FOUND: No API route matches this URL.
